rationale: Civil Engineer with no ML/IR production experience whose entire career is at fictional honeypot companies (Initech, Stark Industries) doing business analysis, with only recent online courses in RAG/LangChain and no embeddings or ranking systems work.

8.4 years of frontend/QA engineering across IT-services firms (Infosys, Tech Mahindra) with no ML or IR production experience; top skills are Illustrator, dbt, and Figma with AI exposure limited to self-learner-level API experimentation.

5.6 years of applied ML (NLP pipelines at Locobuzz, CV models at Dream11, recommendation features at Wipro) with PyTorch and feature engineering depth, but no embeddings-based retrieval, vector DB, NDCG/ranking evaluation experience, and a CV-heavy skew that does not align with the IR mandate.

3.4 years is below the experience threshold, and while Pinecone (advanced), LoRA, and MLOps skills are relevant signals, the production work at Krutrim was fraud detection/API engineering rather than ranking or IR system design, and one role is at Infosys IT services.

Strong tier_1/2 education (NIT Trichy, VIT) and Pinecone/Elasticsearch skills listed, but 6.4 years spent entirely on Android mobile development and cloud engineering at Zomato with self-learner-level AI exposure and no production ML, embeddings, or ranking systems work.

Non-technical career spanning Business Analyst, Graphic Designer, and HR Manager roles with multiple fictional honeypot companies (Pied Piper, Wayne Enterprises); no engineering or ML skills whatsoever.

Career is entirely marketing, sales, operations, and project management roles at Stark Industries (fictional), Acme Corp, and Infosys with no technical or ML work; TTS listed as advanced skill is inconsistent with a marketing/ops profile indicating keyword inflation.

Only 2 years of experience as Operations Manager at TCS doing brand design/ops work, with Data Science listed as advanced despite zero engineering history — classic keyword inflation from a non-technical marketing background.

4.6 years in Mechanical Engineer and HR Manager roles at fictional companies (Initech, Hooli) with skills limited to ETL, Tally, and Content Writing; the Ph.D. in ML from a tier_4 institution is contradicted by an entirely non-technical career history.

12.6 years entirely as Marketing Manager and Project Manager at fictional honeypot companies (Dunder Mifflin x3, Wayne Enterprises) with no engineering background; AI interest is limited to ChatGPT productivity experimentation.
